validation_use: Benchmark VCF/BED and high-confidence/callable regions for public validation.
notes: Use matching genome build and sample release; do not mix GRCh37 and GRCh38 coordinates.

validation_use: Public raw reads and alignments for deeper coverage/callability extraction.
notes: Large files should not be committed; store manifests/checksums and derived summaries.

validation_use: Difficult-region BEDs for low complexity, GC, mappability and other contexts.
notes: Useful for benchmarking where false positives/false negatives cluster by genomic context.

validation_use: Public tumor-normal HG008 resources and draft somatic benchmarks.
notes: Best public path for somatic/cancer validation; current releases are draft benchmark resources.
